review_outcome: Strategic governance approval granted for production deployment
rationale: Governance board reviewed the Ambient AI Scribe system against organizational AI strategy and regulatory readiness. All pre-deployment gates (G-PRE-01 through G-PRE-04) have passed. Risk classification (high-risk) has been confirmed by Compliance Officer. Business case approved with conditions: quarterly re-evaluation, mandatory incident reporting, and human-in-the-loop for clinical summaries.
comment: Automated Conftest check verified governance documentation completeness. This manual approval confirms strategic alignment and authorizes progression to deployment phase.
